application.priority_note: First preference is given to applicants whose last school attended is in Gauteng.
documents_south_african: Latest certified school report / Senior Certificate / results certificate
Next-of-kin or responsible parent/guardian contact details
documents_foreign: Valid study/work permit for full study duration
SAQA evaluation certificate aligned to a South African qualification

nsfas_general_criteria_from_prospectus: Combined household income not above R350,000 per year
For a person with a disability, combined household income not above R600,000 per year
funding.warning: Funding is subject to NSFAS rules, approval and funded-programme status.

matching_guidance_for_ai.reason: TVET matching is mainly based on completed school/NQF level, required school subjects, prior programme level, programme-specific selection criteria, and campus/intake availability.
recommended_match_order: Check highest completed grade or NQF level
Check required subjects and explicit percentage thresholds
Return eligible, possibly eligible, or ineligible with reasons

statuses.possibly_eligible: General rule passes but selection criteria, campus, missing marks or programme classification needs confirmation

important_distinctions: Mathematics is not the same as Mathematical Literacy where explicitly stated
NC(V) is a level-by-level vocational certificate, normally one year per level
NATED programmes use N-level progression and may require workplace experience for the National Diploma
Occupational Certificates combine theory, practical and workplace learning
Short Skills Programmes are not equivalent to full NC(V), NATED or Occupational qualifications
